title: Thali Mahadeva temple, Kozhikode
tagline: Thali Mahadeva temple, Kozhikode — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Tali Shiva Temple or Tali Mahakshetram is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, situated in the heart of the Kozhikode city, Kerala.
overview.description: Tali Shiva Temple or Tali Mahakshetram is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, situated in the heart of the Kozhikode city, Kerala. The temple was built in the 14th century by Zamorin of Calicut. Tali Kshetram is an ancient temple in the heart of Kozhikode town. Shiva is the presiding deity.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kozhikode
topPlaces.description: Kozhikode (pronounced [koːɻikːoːɖɨ̆] ), also known as Calicut, is a city along the Malabar Coast in the state of Kerala in India. The city is also known as the City of Spices.

topPlaces.name: S. M. Street
topPlaces.description: S.M. Street, abbreviation for Sweetmeat Street, also known as Mittai Theruvu, is the busiest shopping street in kerala located in Kozhikode, Kerala, India. The street is a pedestrian zone.

topPlaces.name: Kozhikode Corporation EMS Stadium
topPlaces.description: The EMS Stadium, located in Kozhikode, Kerala, India, is a multi-purpose stadium primarily used for football matches. The stadium is home to the I-League club Gokulam Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kuttichira Beach
topPlaces.description: Kuttichira or Thekkepuram is a quarter located inside the city of Kozhikode in the Indian state of Kerala. Its approximate boundaries are the Arabian Sea on the west, the Kallai river on the south, Vellayil village on the north, and Kozhikode town on the east.

topPlaces.name: Mananchira
topPlaces.description: Mananchira is a man-made freshwater pond situated in the centre of the city of Kozhikode in Kerala, southern India. The pond is 3.49 acres (14,120 m2) in area, is rectangular in shape and is fed by a natural spring.

topPlaces.name: Aster MIMS
topPlaces.description: Aster Malabar Institute of Medical Sciences (Aster MIMS) is a super-specialty hospital located in Kozhikode, India. A NABH-accredited hospital, Aster MIMS was established to offer advanced medical treatment of international standards at affordable rates.

topPlaces.name: Muchundi Mosque
topPlaces.description: The Muchundi Mosque (Malayalam: മുച്ചുന്തിപ്പള്ളി), also known as the Muccunti Palli, and formerly known as the Muchiyan/Machinde/Muchandi Palli, is a Šāfiʿī mosque, located at Kuttichira, in the Kozhikode district in the state of Kerala, India. Kuttichira is the medieval Muslim quarter in the city of Calicut.

topPlaces.name: Arayidathupalam Junction
topPlaces.description: Arayidathupalam Junction is the busiest road intersection of Kozhikode city in India.

items.note: Kozhikode (pronounced [koːɻikːoːɖɨ̆] ), also known as Calicut, is a city along the Malabar Coast in the state of Kerala in India. The city is also known as the City of Spices.
S.M. Street, abbreviation for Sweetmeat Street, also known as Mittai Theruvu, is the busiest shopping street in kerala located in Kozhikode, Kerala, India. The street is a pedestrian zone.
The EMS Stadium, located in Kozhikode, Kerala, India, is a multi-purpose stadium primarily used for football matches. The stadium is home to the I-League club Gokulam Kerala.

Kuttichira or Thekkepuram is a quarter located inside the city of Kozhikode in the Indian state of Kerala. Its approximate boundaries are the Arabian Sea on the west, the Kallai river on the south, Vellayil village on the north, and Kozhikode town on the east.

Mananchira is a man-made freshwater pond situated in the centre of the city of Kozhikode in Kerala, southern India. The pond is 3.49 acres (14,120 m2) in area, is rectangular in shape and is fed by a natural spring.

Aster Malabar Institute of Medical Sciences (Aster MIMS) is a super-specialty hospital located in Kozhikode, India. A NABH-accredited hospital, Aster MIMS was established to offer advanced medical treatment of international standards at affordable rates.

The Muchundi Mosque (Malayalam: മുച്ചുന്തിപ്പള്ളി), also known as the Muccunti Palli, and formerly known as the Muchiyan/Machinde/Muchandi Palli, is a Šāfiʿī mosque, located at Kuttichira, in the Kozhikode district in the state of Kerala, India. Kuttichira is the medieval Muslim quarter in the city of Calicut.
Arayidathupalam Junction is the busiest road intersection of Kozhikode city in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thali Mahadeva temple, Kozhikode?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thali Mahadeva temple, Kozhikode is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thali Mahadeva temple, Kozhikode?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (22 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (132 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thali Mahadeva temple, Kozhikode?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thali Mahadeva temple, Kozhikode at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thali Mahadeva temple, Kozhikode?
faq.a: Stays in Thali Mahadeva temple, Kozhikode start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thali Mahadeva temple, Kozhikode?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kozhikode, S. M. Street, Kozhikode Corporation EMS Stadium, Kuttichira Beach, Mananchira.
